configs.drift_details: No backup files exist. Contains trading signal weights and DSCR market priorities. last_analysis timestamp indicates active updates by the Weekly Outcome Analysis cron job.
configs.notes: This file is programmatically updated by outcome_analyzer.py weekly. All signal_weights and source_weights are at 1.0 (default), suggesting the outcome analyzer may not be making meaningful adjustments, or weights were recently reset. blacklisted_tickers and blacklisted_markets are empty arrays. No backup means a bad analysis run could corrupt signal weights with no rollback.
